title: Runtime Proof Sprint — ProductSelector binding fix + The Golden POST verification
scope: Single-file PATCH on components/purchases/PurchaseItemsEdit.tsx. Introduces updateItemFields() helper for atomic multi-field updates; rewrites handleProductSelect to use one atomic call instead of 4 sequential ones (which suffered from React's batched-render stale-closure bug). Goal of sprint: prove the complete Solar ERP business cycle through UI — Product → Purchase → POST → Warehouse movement → Journal linkage → Snapshot freeze.
hypothesis_tested: PurchaseItemsEdit.handleProductSelect lost field bindings because 4 sequential updateItem() calls each read the same stale `items` closure within a single React batched render, causing last-write-wins behavior where only priceWithoutVat survived.
expected_outcome: After patch, selecting a product from ProductSelector dropdown atomically populates itemName + itemCode + vatRate + priceWithoutVat in a single render cycle. This unblocks Purchase Save+POST cycle, which exercises the full accounting + warehouse stack.

checks.name: static — file structure preserved (no rename, no move)
checks.what: Patched file lives in same path as original

checks.name: static — new helper present
checks.what: updateItemFields helper is introduced exactly once

checks.name: static — handleProductSelect uses single atomic call
checks.what: handleProductSelect contains exactly one updateItemFields call and zero updateItem calls
checks.url: bash -c 'fn=$(awk "/const handleProductSelect/,/^  };/" components/purchases/PurchaseItemsEdit.tsx); echo "updateItem calls: $(echo \"$fn\" | grep -c \"updateItem(\")"; echo "updateItemFields calls: $(echo \"$fn\" | grep -c \"updateItemFields(\")"'

checks.name: static — input handlers still use updateItem (no collateral damage)
checks.what: Single-field input onChange handlers still call updateItem (unchanged correct behavior)

checks.name: build — TypeScript scan clean
checks.what: Partial<EditableItem> is valid; tsc --noEmit produces zero errors
checks.url: echo 'SolarBox auto-runs this; expect ✅ No TypeScript errors'

checks.name: build — pnpm build green
checks.url: echo 'SolarBox auto-runs this; expect ✅ Build PASSED'

checks.name: runtime UI — product selection atomic
checks.what: Open purchase editor → click Item field → typeahead shows products → click 'oil' → Item Name, Code, VAT, Price all populated simultaneously (NOT just Price)
checks.url: echo 'manual: open purchase, select oil product — verify all 4 fields populate at once'

checks.name: runtime UI — Save DRAFT succeeds
checks.what: After product selected, qty filled, Save button works and Saved confirmation appears
checks.url: echo 'manual: Save button → green Saved toast appears'

checks.name: runtime UI — POST succeeds
checks.what: Post button → status flips from DRAFT to POSTED, no error, accounting view appears
checks.url: echo 'manual: Post button → status badge becomes POSTED, no red error banner'

checks.name: DB — snapshot fields populated
checks.what: Posted purchase row has all 5 snapshot fields filled in
checks.url: echo 'manual SQL: SELECT id, status, "totalNetAmount", "totalVatAmount", "totalGrossAmount", "journalEntryId", "postedAt" FROM purchase_documents WHERE status=\'POSTED\' ORDER BY "postedAt" DESC LIMIT 1;'

checks.name: DB — journal entry created and balanced
checks.what: journal_lines for this purchase exist and sum(debit) = sum(credit)
checks.url: echo 'manual SQL: SELECT "journalEntryId", SUM(debit) AS d, SUM(credit) AS c FROM journal_lines WHERE "journalEntryId" = (SELECT "journalEntryId" FROM purchase_documents WHERE status=\'POSTED\' ORDER BY "postedAt" DESC LIMIT 1) GROUP BY "journalEntryId";'

checks.name: DB — warehouse movement exists
checks.what: stock_movement row inserted for the posted purchase, qty matches
checks.url: echo 'manual SQL: SELECT * FROM stock_movements WHERE "sourceDocumentId" = (SELECT id FROM purchase_documents WHERE status=\'POSTED\' ORDER BY "postedAt" DESC LIMIT 1);'

checks.name: DB — stock balance updated
checks.what: stock_balance shows qty of oil in Main warehouse
checks.url: echo 'manual SQL: SELECT "productName", "warehouseName", quantity FROM stock_balance WHERE "productName"=\'oil\' AND "warehouseName"=\'Main\';'

checks.name: INVARIANT — golden snapshot match
checks.what: purchase_documents.totalGrossAmount EQUALS SUM(journal_lines.debit) for this purchase — proves snapshot consistency with journal
checks.url: echo 'manual SQL: SELECT p."totalGrossAmount" AS snapshot_gross, (SELECT SUM(jl.debit) FROM journal_lines jl WHERE jl."journalEntryId" = p."journalEntryId") AS journal_sum FROM purchase_documents p WHERE p.status=\'POSTED\' ORDER BY p."postedAt" DESC LIMIT 1;'

not_included: Sales POST endpoint — Task 68B.3 (next sprint after Golden POST proven)
Technical debt cleanup (cookies.txt, .gitignore, empty backups) — separate micro-task
Legacy requireTenant migration on 4 remaining /api/company/ routes — separate micro-task
rollback: If patch causes regression, single-file rollback via .solar-backups/task68b5-1-runtime-proof/components/purchases/PurchaseItemsEdit.tsx
diff_summary: +44 lines / -5 lines. Adds updateItemFields helper (atomic batch update). Rewrites handleProductSelect to use it. updateItem itself unchanged — still correct for single-field input onChange handlers.
